l5.details: VIX 25.66, VVIX 130.18, GEX 776pts below flip, VIX 30d RoC +60%. P/C corrected to 0.68 (NEUTRAL) — protection demand LOW despite stress. SKEW 139.94 (down from 146). Complacency-within-stress pattern: market not hedging despite deep negative gamma.

l6.details: PCE TODAY. FOMC + Dot Plot in 5 days. Quad Witching OPEX in 7 days. Q-end rebalancing Mar 31.

cascade.narrative: RELIEF RALLY FAILED. March 10 bounce fully reversed. SPX -1.52% to 6672, below 50d and 200d MAs. MOVE explosion (+21%) signals bond market stress. GEX gap widened to 776pts. NFCI tightened 7 straight weeks. FOMC + OPEX in 5-7 days = max catalyst density against max structural fragility. All six layers contributing for first time this cycle.

commentary.key_tension: All six layers firing. P/C corrected to 0.68 — market NOT hedging despite deep negative gamma (776pts below flip) and structural fragility. Complacency-within-stress is MORE dangerous than fear: less put buying = less dealer hedging support = amplified downside.
commentary.bottom_line: CASCADE IMMINENT (9.5/10). Up from 7.0 on 3/10. SPX 6672 below 50d/200d. MOVE +21%. GEX 776pts below flip. NFCI 7wk tightening. Margin $1.28T ALL-TIME HIGH. FOMC + OPEX in 5-7 days. De-risk materially.
